message:
Running command: MCU_DIR="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu"
WRAPPER_RUN="$MCU_DIR/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/wrapper_run"
FIXED_ODB="$WRAPPER_RUN/67-openroad-repairantennas/1-openroad-diodeinsertion/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper_fixed.odb"

echo "=== VDDIO fixed! 24 bpins -> 1 bpin. ==="
ls -lh "$FIXED_ODB"

echo ""
echo "=== Update step 68's state_out.json to use fixed ODB ==="
STATE68="$WRAPPER_RUN/68-openroad-stamidpnr-3/state_out.json"
ls -la "$STATE68"
python3 -c "
import json
state_file = '$STATE68'
with open(state_file) as f:
    state = json.load(f)
print('Current odb:', state.get('odb'))
print('')
# Update to use the fixed ODB
state['odb'] = '$FIXED_ODB'
with open(state_file, 'w') as f:
    json.dump(state, f, indent=2)
print('Updated odb to:', state.get('odb'))
"

echo ""
echo "=== Remove failed step 69 dir ==="
rm -rf "$WRAPPER_RUN/69-openroad-detailedrouting"
echo "Removed step 69"

echo ""
echo "=== Restart DRT from step 69 ==="
cd "$MCU_DIR/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper"
echo "Start: $(date)"
nohup librelane \
  --pdk-root /nc/pdk \
  --pdk sky130A \
  --run-tag wrapper_run \
  --design-dir . \
  --from OpenROAD.DetailedRouting \
  config.json \
  >> /tmp/librelane_final.log 2>&1 &

DRT_PID=$!
echo "DRT restart PID: $DRT_PID"
sleep 8
ps -p $DRT_PID -o pid,stat,pcpu,pmem,etime 2>/dev/null && echo "Running" || echo "FAILED"
tail -5 /tmp/librelane_final.log

function.name: execute_bash
